name: USS SC-671 (SC-671)
events: 12 Jul 1945 At 0521 K/12, USS Hackleback (T/Lt.Cdr. F.E. Janney, USN) made rendezvous with her escort, USS SC-671 (Lt.(jg) J.R. Paulson, USNR).

They arrived at Guam around 1000 K/12, ended her 2nd war patrol at Guam. USS Hackleback was then taken in hand for a normal tender refit by USS Proteus (T/Capt. C.N. Day, USN). The tender refit was completed at 4 August which included a week extension for the fitting of ST radar.
Training off Guam was conducted from 6 to 11 August.
